title: Community Office Hours!
excerpt:

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey community! Our weekly Office Hours resume next Wednesday, September 13 at 6:00pm EDT!

Office Hours is an opportunity for you to bring all your questions and have them answered in a small group setting via Zoom with me and @BiancaT! Whether you’re stuck trying to figure out an automation workaround or need clarification on a feature, we’re here to figure it out with you!

If you’d like to join us, please sign up here!

posts.author: Amor_x (Amy Morgan)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to join this - it’s exactly the type of thing I need. I spend many hours each day on online chat, as I’m having a learn at a fast pace. It’s really disappointing to see this would be held at 11pm UK time. I would really benefit from this type of feature and I’m sure many others in the UK would too.
